failure_mechanism: Concurrent payment requests exhausted available database client-pool capacity, causing connection acquisition waits and reducing API throughput without verified migration lock contention.
mitigation_summary: Service capacity recovered only after connection acquisition latency and active connection demand returned to a stable range; this record does not prescribe a configuration change for a new incident.
narrative_safe: RelayOps payment requests began timing out while database client-pool acquisition waits rose and active connections approached the configured limit. A migration-lock precedent is unsafe unless lock waits are independently confirmed.
observability_signals: active database connections approached configured limit

source_values: active database connections approached configured limit

timeline_summary: API latency rose with pool acquisition waits and high active connection counts. No migration activity or lock-wait pattern was confirmed.
title: Test-only procedure-asymmetry variant: Connection acquisition timeouts reduced API capacity
